_comment: AgriSync Voice Retained Storage - S3 Lifecycle Configuration
Voice clips stay in S3 STANDARD storage class indefinitely so long as the
user retains FullHistoryJournal consent. Erasure is consent-driven and is
executed by the backend ErasureWorker, NOT by S3 lifecycle.
The single rule below cleans up *failed multipart uploads* after 7 days.
This is the only non-destructive housekeeping rule worth shipping in v1 -
every other transition / expiration belongs to Phase 07 hardening.
- Glacier Instant Retrieval transition for clips older than N days
- Glacier Deep Archive transition for clips older than M months
- Object Lock for compliance retention (DPDP rights audit trail)
- Versioning + MFA-Delete (if multi-actor erasure becomes a requirement)
